title: The Unsolved Murder of Irina Hans

scenes.text: An intern’s tragic end shrouded in mystery and unanswered questions.
Irina Hans was murdered in Washington, D.C., in 2002 during her internship.
Her body was found in a National Park, and the case went cold despite extensive investigations.
No clear suspects emerged in Irina’s case, leaving many to wonder what really happened.
scenes.label: UNANSWERED QUESTIONS

scenes.text: Follow for the cases no one can explain.

description: 📍 Washington, D.C., USA - 2002. Irina Hans, a Smithsonian intern, was murdered, yet the case remains unsolved decades later. Follow for daily mysteries!
